operators: Roong Reuang Coach (175-435 THB, every 30-40 min)

routes.notes: No direct bus service bookable online. Travel via local provincial minivans (songthaew/minibus) departing from Bueng Kan bus terminal toward Nakhon Phanom, typically with a change in Nakhon Phanom province. Taxi or private car is the most practical option for this route.
routes.seo_title: How to Get from Bueng Kan to Nakhon Phanom 2026: Bus, Taxi & Costs
routes.seo_description: Bueng Kan to Nakhon Phanom: 216 km via Highway 212 along the Mekong. Local minivan 3–4 hrs (~฿150–250). Private taxi 2–3 hrs (~฿1,200–1,800). No direct online booking — tips inside.

routes.route_note: No direct bus or minivan. Recommended: Chiang Khan → Loei (songthaew, 1h, 60-80 THB) → Nong Khai (bus, 4-5h, 150-200 THB) → Bueng Kan (minivan, 2.5-3h, 250 THB)
